title: Getting Started
description: Learn how to create AI-powered marketing copy with CopyZap. Covers first generation steps, Start Hub launchpad, and Quick Prompt Wizard.

title: Core Workflows
description: The five core workflows: Create New Copy, Improve Existing Copy, Generate Alternatives, Compare & Select, and Apply Brand Voice. Includes step-by-step tutorials.

title: Output, Scoring & Comparison
description: Understand the output card, content scoring (clarity, persuasiveness, tone, SEO), Compare & Blend tools, and how features interact.

title: Setup & Inputs
description: Configure your project inputs, create and apply brand voices (manual, AI generation, URL scan, presets), and save configurations as reusable templates.

title: Copy Maker Overview
description: Learn the philosophy behind Copy Maker and how to get the most from the platform.

title: Optional Output Features
description: Learn what each optional output feature does — from SEO Metadata to GEO Optimization, TL;DR, and Keyword Integration.

title: Voice Styles & Blending
description: Apply voice style transformations (Alex Hormozi, Steve Jobs, Humanize, and more) to enhance your copy with specific stylistic approaches.

title: Workflow Builder
description: Create automated multi-step workflows to streamline repetitive tasks and apply consistent transformations in one generation click.

title: Recommended Settings
description: The best configuration settings for different content types: blog posts, landing pages, ads, emails, and more.

title: Export & File Management
description: Export your copy as HTML or Markdown and manage your generation history efficiently.

title: Dashboard & History
description: Use the Dashboard to find saved outputs, manage sessions, templates, workflows, and track your generation history.

title: Credits & Billing
description: Understand the credit system, costs per action, billing, and best practices to optimize credit usage.

title: Real-Case Workflows
description: Real-world workflows showing how professionals use CopyZap for landing pages, blog posts, social media, and client work.

title: Glossary of Terms
description: Quick reference for all Copy Maker terms, features, and concepts.

title: Troubleshooting & FAQs
description: Solutions to common issues, error messages, and frequently asked questions about using CopyZap effectively.

title: Contact Support
description: Need help, found a bug, or want to request a new feature? Our support team is here to help.
